---
title: North American cold events following sudden stratospheric warming in the presence
  of low Barents-Kara Sea sea ice
pagetitle: 2020-11-1-Zhang2020 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2020
author: Pengfei Zhang, Yutian Wu, Gang Chen and Yueyue Yu
venue: Environmental Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Environmental Research Letters</i>, 15, 124017, doi:10.1088/1748-9326/abc215.
recommended_citation: 'Pengfei Zhang, Yutian Wu, Gang Chen and Yueyue Yu, 2020: North
  American cold events following sudden stratospheric warming in the presence of low
  Barents-Kara Sea sea ice, <i>Environmental Research Letters</i>, 15, 124017, doi:10.1088/1748-9326/abc215.'
paper_url: https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/1748-9326/abc215
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# North American cold events following sudden stratospheric warming in the presence of low Barents-Kara Sea sea ice

*Published in Environmental Research Letters, 2020*

**Recommended citation:** Pengfei Zhang, Yutian Wu, Gang Chen and Yueyue Yu, 2020: North American cold events following sudden stratospheric warming in the presence of low Barents-Kara Sea sea ice, <i>Environmental Research Letters</i>, 15, 124017, doi:10.1088/1748-9326/abc215.

[Download paper](https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/1748-9326/abc215){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
